programme.title: EN FA Cup Review Show 2025/26 | E6
programme.desc: All the highlights and key stories from each round of the FA Cup. Hosted by Adam Smith with Aaron McLean and Adebayo Akinfenwa

programme.title: Arsenal vs Burnley - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 37
programme.desc: Arsenal have lost just one of their 19 Premier League games against Burnley, going down 1-0 at home in December 2020. Burnley have never scored more than once in 19 Premier League meetings with Arsenal, the most one side has faced any other without netting twice in a match in the competition.

programme.title: beIN SPORTS, le plus grand des spectacles
Lorient vs Le Havre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Lorient have lost just 14% of their Ligue 1 meetings with Le Havre, only having a lower defeat percentage against Le Mans and Ajaccio among teams they have faced at least five times. Lorient are unbeaten in their last nine home matches against Le Havre in all competitions, with their last defeat on home soil against them dating back to November 1

programme.title: Nantes vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Nantes have lost only two of their last 17 Ligue 1 matches against Toulouse, with those defeats coming in April 2019 and August 2023. With 23 points, Nantes are already assured to record their lowest points tally in a Ligue 1 season. Their previous lowest tally was 33 points in 2023-24, when they finished 14th.

programme.title: Brest vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 34
programme.desc: Brest have won four of their last five Ligue 1 matches against Angers, having won only one of their first eight such meetings. Brest have lost just one of their last 14 home matches against Angers in all competitions, keeping 10 clean sheets and conceding only four goals in that run.

programme.title: Finals - UEFA European Women’s U17
programme.desc: UEFA European Women’s U17 is the annual international youth football championship organized by UEFA for the women's under-17 national teams of Europe. The defending champions are the Netherlands, but are unable to defend their title as they did not qualify for this tournament. The top five teams will qualify for the 2026 FIFA U-17 Women's World Cup

programme.title: Day 11 - Final - ATP 1000 Internazionali BNL d'Italia - 2026
programme.desc: ATP 1000 Internazionali BNL d’Italia 2026 takes place at Rome’s Foro Italico from 6–17 May, on outdoor clay courts. A key stop in the clay-court swing, the Masters 1000 event features a 96-player singles draw, with €8,235,540 in prize money and 1,000 ranking points awarded to the champion.

programme.title: South Africa vs Algeria - CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations Morocco 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: CAF U17 Africa Cup of Nations is the annual African youth football tournament organized by Confederation of African Football (CAF) for players aged 17 and below. Morocco was chosen as the host of this edition. The top 10 teams qualified for the 2026 FIFA U-17 World Cup in Qatar as the CAF representatives. Morocco are the defending champions.
